## Warnings and Scanner Limitations


**Limitations:**
- Endpoint matching uses string normalization; dynamic path segments may cause false positives/negatives.
- Hook-to-page reachability is inferred from file/directory proximity, not AST import graph traversal.
- Schema drift detection is keyword-based and produces many false positives.
- Dashboard key detection uses regex on dict literals; complex return structures may be missed.
- Frontend files with inline API strings (not in endpoints.ts) may be missed if the pattern doesn't match.
